ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED( Opportunity_Division__c ) && NOT(CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Self Service')) && NOT(CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Channel')) && $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps' && $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended' && $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator' && $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User' && $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User No DF'
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have permission to edit the Opportunity Division field. If any edits are needed on the field, please reach out to SalesOps with the changes & the reason.
